retrieved_result: To Change the Look of Outlook Replies \"All versions of Outlook allow you to change the font used for the text you insert when your reply into a message. (You can't change the font in a plain text message, of course, but can choose the font to use to display plain text messages. )When your font looks tiny, its usually caused by the zoom\"
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses changing font appearance in Outlook replies, which is unrelated to IDEs or software development.
combined_text_for_llm: To Change the Look of Outlook Replies "All versions of Outlook allow you to change the font used for the text you insert when your reply into a message. (You can't change the font in a plain text message, of course, but can choose the font to use to display plain text messages. )When your font looks tiny, its usually caused by the zoom

history.title: To Change the Look of Outlook Replies
history.description: "All versions of Outlook allow you to change the font used for the text you insert when your reply into a message. (You can't change the font in a plain text message, of course, but can choose the font to use to display plain text messages. )When your font looks tiny, its usually caused by the zoom
